calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Phillip T. Kilduff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff NCCS, Inc., dba North Coast Collection Service.
Tom Kirschner, Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Global Passage, LLC, dba Global Passage.
Default entered against defendant on April 30, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 18, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff NCCS, Inc., dba North Coast Collection Service, and against the Defaulted Defendant Global Passage, LLC, dba Global Passage as follows:

Damages/Principal - $60,182.32.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,525.82.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $488.71, for a total of $69,996.85.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Sep-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
